instruction: Implement from_roman(s): convert a Roman numeral string to its integer value, handling subtractive forms. from_roman('IV')==4, from_roman('IX')==9, from_roman('LVIII')==58, from_roman('MCMXCIV')==1994.

files.test_fromroman.py:
from fromroman import from_roman


def test_from_roman():
    assert from_roman('IV') == 4
    assert from_roman('IX') == 9
    assert from_roman('LVIII') == 58
    assert from_roman('MCMXCIV') == 1994
